rationale: Clear, well-organized argument with strong paragraph-to-paragraph flow and an engaging, persuasive voice. The language is mostly direct, though it occasionally leans on stock rhetoric and repeats the core point. Its main weakness is specificity: it gives plausible examples of patrons but few concrete facts, local details, or precise evidence.
